name: google-ads-baby
description: Google Ads campaign management MCP server with two-phase safety confirmations.

interface.shortDescription: Manage Google Ads campaigns through a safe local MCP server.
interface.longDescription: Google Ads MCP server for listing accounts and campaigns, adjusting budgets, changing campaign status, and preparing new Search campaigns, ad groups, and responsive search ads with two-phase safety confirmation.
defaultPrompt: Show campaigns for a selected account.
